meta.title: One Computer, One Future | Digital Future Initiative
meta.description: An initiative by Sanatani SSC 91 to build Computer Labs, AI, Web Development and Digital Skill Training for orphan children in Bangladesh. Your small donation can change a child's future.
meta.keywords: orphan donation, computer donation, bangladesh charity, education donation, AI training, web development, orphan computer lab, digital education, Sanatani SSC 91

hero.heading: Every child holds infinite potential within.
hero.subtext: The child who lags behind today due to lack of opportunity, with the right training tomorrow, can become an AI Engineer, Web Developer, or a successful Freelancer. Our goal is not just to give charity, but to equip them with a skill that stays with them for life.

whyWeStarted.title: Why We Started?
whyWeStarted.content: There are countless talented children in orphanages across Bangladesh. But they lack Computers, Laptops, Proper Guidance, Modern Education, and Technology Learning Opportunities. As a result, many talents are lost prematurely. We want to change that picture.

items.label: Laptop
items.desc: Education hindered by lack of laptops

vision.title: Our Dream
vision.content: In the next five years, bring at least one orphanage completely under a digital education system.

partners.title: Future Collaboration Plans
partners.disclaimer: We will try to collaborate with these institutions in the future. There is currently no formal partnership.

items.title: Confidence
items.desc: Strength to stand on one's own feet

items.a: Every donation is directly used for setting up Computer Labs, purchasing laptops, internet connectivity, and student training. Monthly reports and bills are published on our transparency dashboard.
You can join our volunteer team. We will assign tasks based on your skills and availability. Fill out the form below.
Yes, we regularly organize visits for donors and volunteers. Please contact us in advance.
We select students in consultation with the orphanage authorities. Priority is given to those who are talented and eager to learn.

footerCTA.text: Today's small contribution can create tomorrow's successful software engineer.
